creator: stickybit@gmx.net
text:
Using Xfce 4.2.3.2 with xfce4-weather-plugin-0.4.9_3. The plugin causes
following message on every weather update / remote server connection:

"xfce4-panel in free(): warning: modified (page-) pointer"

Sometimes (sporadically) the plugin causes xfce4-panel to crash after very
often updates, i.e. a dozen forced updates within few seconds.

Please contact me if you need further informations.

Thanks!
